Headline: Financial - David Ross Education Trust (State), National
Info: The David Ross Education Trust, which operates 36 academies, is preparing to make staffing changes and redundancies across a third of its schools due to severe financial pressures caused by falling pupil numbers.

Headline: Financial - Various Sixth Forms (State), National
Info: State sixth form leaders have warned that a lower-than-expected 0.5 per cent funding increase will threaten their ability to offer a broad range of subjects and hold down class sizes, representing an 18 per cent real-terms cut since 2010.

Headline: Closure - Our Lady's Abingdon, Oxfordshire
Info: Our Lady's Abingdon, an independent school founded in 1860, has gone into liquidation and its site is expected to be sold following its permanent closure due to financial reasons.

Headline: Closure - Fountainhall Primary (State), Scottish Borders
Info: Scottish Borders Council is launching a public consultation over the permanent closure of Fountainhall Primary School, a rural state school that was mothballed after its roll fell to just one pupil.

Headline: Merger - Northampton College and Moulton College, Northamptonshire
Info: Northampton College and Moulton College have announced a proposed merger aimed at creating a more financially secure and resilient institution with a combined turnover of over £70 million.

Headline: Closure - LIPA School (State), Liverpool
Info: The Secretary of State for Education and the board of trustees have made a substantive decision to permanently close the primary and secondary academy by 31 August 2026, prompting parents to launch a petition.
